palfium.dose_note: NOTE: The drug is reportedly highly unpredicable and has a strange, rapid, tolerance behaviour.
palfium.name: palfium

properties.dose: Oral Light: 2.5-5mg Common: 5-7.5mg Strong: 7.5-10mg+ | NOTE: The drug is reportedly highly unpredicable and has a strange, rapid, tolerance behaviour.
properties.summary: Dextromoramide, a rare and powerful opioid analgesic approximately three times as potent as morphine with a shorter duration. Generally only seen in the Netherlands. Reported as having strange and rapid tolerance behaviour.
